violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food processor dicer blade) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Per interview of staff, orange juice press machine is only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The juicing machine must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. PIC notified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
Inspector observed pastries at the self-service station without ingredient/allergen information. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
Inspector observed containers with moisture stacked on top of each other without proper airdrying. PIC unstacked items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (slicer and containers/bottles) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, old label residue and/or other debris. Items were washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
Bags of garbage was observed around the refuse area. Area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
